children.text: In my family, we usually have three meals every day.
children.cn: 在我的家里，我们通常每天吃三顿饭。

children.text: For breakfast, we like simple and warm food, such as soy milk and steamed buns.
children.cn: 早餐我们喜欢简单而暖和的食物，比如豆浆和馒头。

children.text: Lunch is always exciting because there are many different kinds of food.
We often have rice with meat and vegetables, but my absolute favourite is oil-splashed noodles.
They taste very delicious and special!
children.cn: 它们尝起来非常美味和特别！
我们经常吃米饭配肉和蔬菜，但我最喜欢的是油泼面。
午餐总是令人兴奋，因为有很多不同种类的食物。

children.text: In the evening, our whole family sits together to enjoy a big dinner with many hot dishes.
children.cn: 晚上，我们全家坐在一起享用丰盛的晚餐，有很多热菜。

children.text: Of course, we use chopsticks for every meal, which is a very important part of Chinese culture.
children.keywords: chopsticks, important part, Chinese food culture
children.cn: 当然，我们每餐都用筷子，这是中国文化非常重要的一部分。
